problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Vagus. Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
